description: Three compliance findings should each surface as a topic. Stories must carry the `compliance` (or similar) tag.

required_topics.rationale: IEC 62443 firmware signing attestation finding on the firmware deployment pipeline — annual evidence collection lapsed.
ITAR finding on controlled technical data being replicated cross-region to EU-West data lake.
AS9100 finding on QualityHub NCR/CAPA records configured for 18-month retention instead of the required 10 years.
